headline: Ty Simpson: Had secret meeting with Rams' McVay before draft
description: Newly drafted QB Ty Simpson said in an ESPN Radio interview that he kept his meeting with coach Sean McVay "private" in accordance with the Rams' wishes.

headline: Prospect X is drafted; identity is revealed
description: ESPN's Kalyn Kahler set out to find the most overlooked player in the NFL Draft, better known as Prospect X. His identity is now revealed and he's headed to Jacksonville.

headline: NFL draft 1st round averages 13.2M viewers, down from last year
description: The first round of the NFL draft averaged 13.2 million viewers across television and digital platforms, making it the third-most watched first round on record, behind 2020's audience of 15.5 million and last year's 13.6 million.

headline: NFL fifth-year option tracker: 2023 first-round draft class
description: The deadline for teams to pick up the fifth-year option on rookie contracts is Friday. Which players have had their options picked up?

headline: Why Daniel Jeremiah leans Dante Moore over Arch Manning for 2027 No. 1 pick
description: Daniel Jeremiah joins Rich Eisen and explains why he is leaning toward Oregon quarterback Dante Moore to be the first selection in next year's NFL draft.

headline: Fantasy football: Rating the 2026 rookies in redraft and dynasty leagues
description: Matt Bowen provides his analysis of this year's rookie class in fantasy, in terms of redraft and dynasty value.

headline: Why Packers GM Gutekunst didn't take a WR in 2026 NFL draft
description: In 2025, Matthew Golden was the first Round 1 wideout taken by the Packers since 2002, but they drafted none in 2026.

headline: Dan Orlovsky: Jets have as bright a future as anyone in NFL
description: Dan Orlovsky explains why he is optimistic about the Jets' future after the 2026 NFL draft.

headline: Saints transform wideout room in three-day NFL draft spree
description: Led by first-round pick Jordyn Tyson, New Orleans added three WRs who can inject enthusiasm, talent and depth.

headline: Biggest 2026 NFL postdraft questions for all 32 teams
description: The 2026 NFL draft is over, but can the rookies make an impact? We answer lingering questions for all 32 teams.

headline: Cowboys' great Darren Woodson on Caleb Downs: 'Yes sirrr!'
description: Dallas hopes Downs, the No. 11 draft pick, will use his versatility and leadership to quarterback the defense.

headline: Browns' offense by position after 2026 NFL draft: QB, WR, OL
description: The offensive-heavy draft marks the final checkpoint for Cleveland and a unit has been focused on improvement.

headline: NFL draft caps off wild week in Pittsburgh sports
description: From the Pirates to the Penguins to the NFL draft, last week was a special one for the city of Pittsburgh.

headline: Source: QB Diego Pavia accepts invite to Ravens minicamp
description: Undrafted Vanderbilt quarterback Diego Pavia, one of the most polarizing figures in college football, accepted an invitation to attend next weekend's rookie minicamp with the Baltimore Ravens, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Sunday afternoon.

description: What were the best selections in each round? Which teams filled their needs? What were the top in-draft trades, and what was the most surprising pick?
